scripts.run: npx -y concurrently -n "parser,data,analysis,ui" -c "magenta,blue,green,yellow" "npm run run:parser" "npm run run:data" "npm run run:analysis" "npm run run:ui"
scripts.deploy: npx -y concurrently -n "parser,data" -c "magenta,blue" "npm run deploy:parser" "npm run deploy:data"
scripts.test: npx -y concurrently "cd am-parser && am test" "cd am-market-data && am test"
